summary: First test run for Gravrel site rebuild. Backend: 9/9 pytest cases passed (health, root, contact happy/missing/invalid/optional-phone, newsletter happy/invalid/missing). Resend sandbox gracefully returns ok:true with email_status='stored_only' when sending to support@gravrel.com (expected). MongoDB persistence verified for both contact_submissions and newsletter_subscribers. Frontend: page loads cleanly with no console/page errors, eye-catching glowing Launch AetherOps button in navbar with correct href/target/rel, all nav anchors (#about/#services/#certifications/#contact) and corresponding sections present, contact form submission clears fields and shows success toast, newsletter subscribe shows success toast, footer launch button correct, contact email/phone links correct, mobile menu toggle works on 390px viewport.
action_items: OPTIONAL: Once gravrel.com domain is verified at resend.com/domains and SENDER_EMAIL is switched to support@gravrel.com (or noreply@gravrel.com), actual email delivery will work; currently email_status returns 'stored_only' due to Resend sandbox limit. This is expected and documented.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: 'logger' is referenced inside create_contact handler (lines 132/136) and defined at module level on line 173 AFTER routes are declared. Functionally OK because module-level code finishes before requests arrive, but for readability move the logging.basicConfig + logger = ... block above the route definitions.
server.py: Resend API key is committed in /app/backend/.env. Ensure this file remains gitignored before publishing.
Newsletter endpoint does not dedupe emails (same email can subscribe multiple times). Consider unique index on email or upsert.
Contact endpoint doesn't return Pydantic-validated response model — fine for MVP but adding a response_model would harden the contract.

Resend error string is returned to client in 'email_error' field on stored_only response — this leaks internal provider info. Consider returning only a generic message to the client and logging the detail server-side.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures auto-clean TEST_-prefixed contact submissions and test_newsletter@ newsletter subscribers in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py covers all 4 endpoints with Mongo persistence checks. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_api.py -v. The Resend sandbox limitation is expected behavior (email_status='stored_only'); do not flag as bug. Submission is stored regardless.
